brand.fontFamily: -apple-system, system-ui, Segoe UI, Noto Sans, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji

workflow.name: How can I schedule an agent to run every day and also configure it to receive a name in metadata?
workflow.description: Schedule an agent to run daily and configure metadata with a name

steps.title: Open Agent Sessions
steps.description: Click on Agent Sessions in the sidebar to view your agents.

steps.title: Open Scheduled Jobs
steps.description: Click on Scheduled Jobs in the sidebar to manage agent schedules.

steps.title: Schedule Agent
steps.description: Click the Schedule Agent button to start creating a new scheduled job.

steps.title: Describe Task
steps.description: Enter a description of what the agent should do in the Task field.

steps.title: Set Schedule
steps.description: Click on the schedule dropdown to select the frequency.

steps.title: Select Daily Frequency
steps.description: Select 'Every day at midnight (UTC)' from the dropdown to schedule the agent daily.

steps.title: Open Advanced Options
steps.description: Click on Advanced Options to reveal additional settings like metadata.

steps.title: Configure Metadata
steps.description: Enter your JSON metadata here, for example: {"name": "My Daily Agent"}.

steps.title: Create Scheduled Job
steps.description: Click the 'Create Scheduled Job' button to save and activate your daily agent.
